title: Crowd flow management — North Concourse
description: Monitor fan flow at North Concourse entrances. Redirect fans from high-density areas. Maintain clear pathways to exits.

title: Direct fans from Food Court East
description: Post at Food Court East entrance. Redirect overflow fans to Food Court West. Communicate wait time estimates.
ai_guidance: Inform fans: 'Food Court West has shorter queues — just 8 minutes wait, 5 minutes walk via South Concourse.'

title: Accessibility support — Upper Deck
description: Assist fans with mobility issues to their seats in Upper Deck. Ensure elevator access is clear. Report any accessibility barriers.

title: Medical standby — Lower Bowl Section 112
description: Remain on standby near Section 112 following earlier fainting incident. Monitor for further medical events. Report any new cases immediately.
ai_guidance: Key signs to watch: pale skin, confusion, sitting down suddenly, fanning themselves. If observed, provide shade, water, and notify medical coordinator.

title: Crowd control — Food Court East overflow
description: Manage queue at Food Court East. Implement one-in-one-out policy. Coordinate with Carlos Rivera for redirection signage.

title: Accreditation check — Tribuna Norte perimeter
description: Monitor the Tribuna Norte perimeter for unauthorized access attempts. Verify accreditation of all non-fan personnel. Report incidents immediately.

title: Wayfinding — Stairwell B congestion
description: Direct fans away from congested Stairwell B in Concourse Ring. Guide to Stairwell A as alternate route. Update every 5 minutes.
ai_guidance: Say: 'Stairwell A is 30 metres to your left, clear of congestion, 2 minutes faster right now.'

title: Secure perimeter — Food Village suspicious item
description: Maintain 20m exclusion zone around kiosk 4. Do not approach the item. Prevent fans from entering the area. Await EOD team.
ai_guidance: If fan approaches: 'This area is temporarily closed for a safety check. Please use the North food kiosks. Thank you for your patience.'

title: Cardiac emergency response — Medical Bay A
description: Continue care for fan in cardiac distress. AED deployed. Paramedics en route. Keep area clear for ambulance access.

title: Post-match exit management briefing
description: Attend 21:00 briefing for post-match exit procedures. Coordinate with zone leads for orderly egress. Know your assigned exit gate.
